title: Add restart support for masked spaces

body:
We only ever need to use the `loc::Union{LeftBoundaryWindow, Interior, RightBoundaryWindow}` in `should_call_left_boundary`, `should_call_right_boundary`, and `get_boundary` to determine which stencil function to call (left, interior, or right).

Despite this narrow scope of where it's needed, we currently pass `loc` through every single `getidx` and `stencil` call. It also requires branching right at the top-most part of the `apply_stencil!` (mentioned [here](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/2282#issue-2985349164)).

This PR removes `loc` as an argument and simply computes it on-the-fly inside `getidx(space, ::StencilBroadcasted, ...)`, which is the only place that it's really needed.

I'm testing this out to improve gpu performance, but it also seems like an overall simplification in that we're deleting ~300 lines of code (part of this may just be formatter artifacts, but still).

This is actually the proper closing of #2250.
title: Compute stencil location on the fly
